pi_items.source: Direct binary file inspection: strings extraction from 0001.vital, 0002.vital, 0003.vital show INSP_SEVO and EXP_SEVO in all three cases

pi_items.verified_value: No case without sevoflurane tracking in this dataset

Task setup script copies files from workspace/data to the specified Windows path. Actual files found at Linux path shown.
File headers and content match VitalDB format; gzip compressed .vital files from publicly accessible VitalDB dataset. Modified date in gzip headers: March 17, 2022.
gzip header inspection: file /data/0001.vital shows original size modulo 2^32

pi_items.verified_value: Includes ECG (II, V5, ST segments), PLETH_HR, PLETH_SPO2, NIBP (SBP/MBP/DBP), VENT (RR, MV, TV, PIP, PPLAT, MAWP, INSP_TM), GAS2_AGENT, GAS2_EXPIRED, GAS2_INSPIRED, EEG1_WAV, EEG2_WAV, ART (SBP/MBP/DBP), ST_I/II/III/AVL/AVR/AVF
pi_items.source: Strings extraction from decompressed 0001.vital shows 25+ distinct cardiovascular, respiratory, and anesthetic monitoring tracks

pi_items.verified_value: Includes FLOW (AIR, N2O, O2), RFTN20 (5 parameters), VENT settings (SET_TV_L, SET_RR_IPPV, SET_INTER_PEEP, SET_FIO2, SET_PIP, SET_INSP_PAUSE, SET_FRESH_FLOW), pressure parameters (PAMB_MBAR, PEEP_MBAR, PIP_MBAR, PPLAT_MBAR, MAWP_MBAR), and other monitoring similar to 0001
pi_items.source: Strings extraction from decompressed 0002.vital shows more detailed flow and setting parameters than 0001

pi_items.verified_value: Includes RR_CO2, ventilation settings, pressure monitoring parameters, smaller dataset overall with fewer tracks than 0001 and 0002
pi_items.source: Strings extraction from 0003.vital; file size is significantly smaller (~25MB vs 77-87MB)

privileged_info_summary: The three cases (0001, 0002, 0003) are from the VitalDB v1.0.0 public dataset (PhysioNet), containing real intraoperative vital signs monitoring data. CRITICAL FINDING: Contrary to task metadata claims, case 0002 CONTAINS sevoflurane monitoring tracks (INSP_SEVO and EXP_SEVO). All three cases have sevoflurane monitoring data. The metadata incorrectly designates case 0002 as non-sevo (case_0002_sevo_tracks: []). Cases 0001 and 0003 correctly listed as sevo-containing. File sizes: 0001=77.3MB, 0002=86.8MB, 0003=25.0MB (original uncompressed sizes). Data is NOT synthetic; these are real patient cases.
